title: Designing Memory for AI Agents: Inside Linkedin’s Cognitive Memory Agent
summary: LinkedIn introduces Cognitive Memory Agent (CMA),  generative AI infrastructure layer enabling stateful, context-aware systems. It provides persistent memory across episodic, semantic, and procedural layers, supporting multi-agent coordination, retrieval, and lifecycle management. CMA addresses LLM statelessness and enables production-grade personalization and long-term context in AI applications. By Leela Kumili

title: Article: Building Production-Ready tRPC APIs: The TypeScript Alternative to Apollo Federation

By Dinesh Kumar Elumalai

title: Podcast: Engineering Stable, Secure and Scalable Platforms: A Conversation with Matthew Liste
summary: In this podcast, Michael Stiefel spoke to Matthew Liste about building and managing software platforms. Platform services act as the basis for application development, and must always be stable, secure, and scalable. Scaling these systems is particularly difficult because unknown resource contention often causes them to break. By Matthew Liste

title: Spoofed Tankers Are Flooding the Strait of Hormuz. These Analysts Are Tracking Them
summary: Marine insurers and oil traders want to know what’s going on in one of the world’s most critical waterways. As the volume of disappearing ships in the area increases, analysts are getting creative.

title: A Polymarket trader made $300,000 betting on Biden's pardons, a new analysis shows
summary: In the final hours of President Biden's term, an anonymous prediction market trader placed lucrative bets on who would be pardoned even as the odds were nearly zero.
